title: Tydi Glass Butter Dish with Lid & Bamboo Base – 10.5 x110x7cm (200g up to 250g Capacity) Butter Tray for Fresh Storage – Cheese Dish with Lid – Large Metal & Enamel Butter Dish Alternative
features: ✔ Sleek Glass Butter Dish with Lid & Natural Bamboo Base - Elevate your countertop with this glass butter dish with lid, paired with a sustainable bamboo base. Stylish, compact, and ideal for everyday use or entertaining.
✔ Perfect Fit for Standard & Large Butter Blocks - 10.5 x110x7cm sized to accommodate most brands, from a mini butter dish portion to a large butter dish block.
✔ Airtight Seal for Long-Lasting Freshness - Preserve flavor and prevent odor absorption with the airtight lid. A practical butter dish insulated option that keeps butter soft yet fresh.
✔ Versatile Use Beyond Butter - Not just a butter tray—this cheese dish with lid also works for soft cheeses, mini desserts, or small snacks. A charming, multi-purpose glass storage solution.
✔ Easy to Maintain & Eco-Friendly - Dishwasher-safe lid; bamboo base should be handwashed. Unlike a metal butter dish or enamel butter dish with lid, it’s simple to clean and plastic-free.
description: Product Description Fresh & Easy The tight-fitting lid keeps butter fresh and odors at bay, while the bamboo and glass are easy to clean. Elevate your kitchen with this blend of style and practicality! Stylish & Durable Add a touch of sophistication with the Tydi Glass Butter Dish. Its chic bamboo base and sleek glass lid offer both elegance and durability. Perfect Fit Sized at 150 x 110 x 70 mm, it’s ideal for standard butter blocks and perfect for serving cheese and desserts.
